title: Is this just the Beginning?
summary: A brief discussion about UAP disclosure, suggesting that publicly released evidence represents only a small fraction of what exists. The speakers indicate that more compelling videos, photographs, and reports exist beyond the three publicly released Pentagon videos.

events.description: Referenced as a starting point for UAP knowledge, suggesting current disclosures reflect what was known in the 1940s

key_claims.claim: The three publicly released UAP videos are probably the least compelling of the ones that were available
There are videos, photographs, and reports that are extremely compelling beyond what has been released publicly
The publicly released evidence is just the tip of the iceberg
Current disclosures represent a snapshot of what was known in the 1940s
